title: The Sickening Fairy Tale of Yasmin Hanani
description: Industry is making a point about how power works in a world of interconnected crime.
hook: How HBO's *Industry* reveals power dynamics through interconnected crime and morally complex female characters.

title: Tom Junod Finally Reckons with What It Means to Be a Man
description: "In a long list of classic stories, the legendary magazine writer helped teach readers what masculinity looks like in the 21st century. To write his first book, he had to confront the man who first taught him: his father."
hook: Tom Junod's reckoning with masculinity and fatherhood through decades of iconic magazine storytelling.

title: A cow carcass, buckets of blood, poisoned dogs: A lot of death went into the making of Chaim Soutine’s art
description: A cow carcass, buckets of blood, poisoned dogs: A lot of death went into the making of Chaim Soutine’s art
hook: The grotesque sensory obsessions behind Chaim Soutine's art: blood, decay, and artistic ambition.

title: Alia Shawkat has been looking for her first play for years
description: Nearly 20 years moving to New York, Alia Shawkat finally found her first stage role in You Got Older at A24's Cherry Lane Theater.
hook: Alia Shawkat's 20-year journey to her first stage role reveals late-bloomer creative reinvention.

title: Who Can I Dance With?
description: "From sneaking into underground basements in Tehran to learning to dance with almost no words in Northern California, I had done everything I could."
hook: A dancer's intimate memoir spanning Tehran basements to California—language, body, belonging across cultures.
